summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of purple accent color implementation and new research features. All 10 specified features tested successfully with excellent UI/UX implementation.
passed_tests: Purple accent color (#6366f1) visible throughout navigation, buttons, and UI elements
Research page displays exactly 7 briefings with purple left borders
Research paper drawer opens correctly when clicking briefings
Context filter buttons work with purple active states
Sealed Card Protocol page displays all required sections (Introduction, Key Concepts, Methodology)
PDF download link functional with correct external URL
Portfolio page accessible via About page link
Portfolio page shows Sealed Card Protocol in publications section
About page contains working link to Portfolio
Tool page uses purple accent for active states (sectors, buttons, progress)
Navigation shows purple underline for active page
All pages load without errors and maintain consistent design
